name: The Ghost Network
motto: Seen once is once too many.
goal: Maintain the most feared assassin-and-extraction network on the eastern seaboard. Selective contracts only — no children, no civilians, no work for the corporations who ran the betrayal.
values: no cleaning up other people's messes for free
fears: the original betrayers locating Jax
a corruption inside the network
becoming the thing they used to fight

faction_state.tensions: Cold war with the Iron Rose Syndicate. They share a city, not a philosophy. Mama Delgado wants information; Jax wants to disappear. Each tolerates the other because moving against the other is unwinnable for both.

name: The Iron Rose Syndicate
goal: Run the largest organized-crime operation on the eastern seaboard through information, loyalty, and selective violence. Long-term: legitimize enough holdings that the next generation doesn't need a shotgun.
values: ruthless precision when ruthlessness is required
fears: the federal task force getting a clean conviction
Jax taking a contract on her without a warning
her grandchildren ending up in the family business by default

faction_state.tensions: The federal task force has been circling for two years. The neighborhood loves her. Half the cops on her payroll are starting to realize the heat is real. Mama Delgado knows three of her lieutenants are skimming and is letting it run because she wants to see who the skimmers are loyal to first.

name: The 14th Precinct
motto: We answer the call. The other call.
goal: Maintain operational control of the 14th as the largest dirty-precinct in the city. Take Iron Rose protection money quietly; cover for the Ghost Network when it suits.
fears: the Federal Task Force flipping a desk officer
the Iron Rose escalating from protection to ownership
internal affairs growing teeth

faction_state.tensions: Captain Marquez's lieutenant has been talking to a federal agent. Marquez knows. He hasn't decided whether to flip the lieutenant first or the agent.

name: The Hexshore Holdings Ring
goal: Run a multi-shell embezzlement operation through Hexshore Holdings. Move 30M annually through three layers of legitimate-looking business.
fears: the Federal Task Force subpoena that names every shell
the Iron Rose offering 'partnership'
an internal embezzler embezzling from them

faction_state.tensions: An internal accountant has begun keeping a private ledger. Iris is aware. She has not decided yet whether to fire him or hire him as a partner.

name: The Federal Organized-Crime Task Force
motto: We don't do precinct politics. We do RICO.
goal: Build a multi-year RICO case across the corrupt 14th, the Iron Rose Syndicate, and the Hexshore Ring. Secure indictments before any one party realizes the others are also being investigated.
fears: the 14th flipping their inside agent
Hexshore moving offshore
the Iron Rose making the bench too dirty to seat

faction_state.tensions: Agent Navarro has been receiving anonymous tips that match the Hexshore ledger. The tips' authenticity check out. The source remains unknown.

name: Halloran & Greer Investigations
motto: We work for the client. The client is rarely the city.
goal: Maintain a small principled PI agency that takes cases the police won't and the federal task force can't. Protect Halloran's daughter from the Iron Rose. Quietly feed evidence to Agent Navarro when it serves.
values: the long game against the precinct
fears: a hit on Halloran's daughter
the Iron Rose buying their office building out from under them
Navarro's case collapsing before it indicts

faction_state.tensions: Halloran's daughter is dating a man whose father works for Mama Iron Rose. Halloran knows. He has not told the daughter what he knows.

name: The North Market Gang
motto: We were here when nobody else was. We're staying.
goal: Hold the North Market neighborhood. Run small-scale street operations. Resist the Iron Rose's slow encroachment. Protect kids from being recruited too young.
fears: the Iron Rose absorbing the gang by force
a kid getting recruited despite the rule
the precinct deciding to make the gang an example

faction_state.tensions: Dom's nephew was offered a recruiting pitch by Iron Rose last week. The nephew turned it down. Dom is preparing for the retaliation.
